description: Create configuration system: Implement config package that reads/writes ~/.config/wt/config.yaml. Config should store list of projects with 'name' and 'path' fields. Include functions: LoadConfig(), SaveConfig(), and InitConfig(). Config struct should be: type Config struct { Projects []Project }; type Project struct { Name string, Path string }.
acceptance_criteria: pkg/config/config.go exists with Config and Project structs
InitConfig() creates default config if not exists
